title: Simple VM Consolidation Algorithm
description: Algorithm to determine which VMs to migrate and which servers to power down for energy savings
code:
// VM Consolidation Algorithm
BEGIN
 FOR each server in dataCenter:
 Calculate utilization(server)
 
 serversToPowerDown = []
 overloadedServers = []
 
 // Identify overloaded and underutilized servers
 FOR each server in dataCenter:
 IF utilization(server) < MIN_THRESHOLD (20%):
 underutilized.add(server)
 ELSE IF utilization(server) > MAX_THRESHOLD (80%):
 overloadedServers.add(server)
 
 // Migrate VMs from underutilized servers
 FOR each server in underutilized:
 FOR each vm in server:
 targetServer = findBestServer(vm, overloadedServers)
 IF targetServer != NULL:
 migrate(vm, targetServer)
 serversToPowerDown.add(server)
 
 // Power down unused servers
 FOR each server in serversToPowerDown:
 powerDown(server)
 
 RETURN consolidatedState
END
explanation: This algorithm identifies underutilized servers (below 20% utilization) and migrates their VMs to other servers, then powers down the empty servers to save energy. The MAX_THRESHOLD ensures no target server becomes overloaded.

title: Green Workload Scheduling Algorithm
description: Schedule computational workloads based on renewable energy availability and carbon intensity
code:
// Carbon-Aware Workload Scheduler
BEGIN
 INPUT: workloadQueue, currentCarbonIntensity, renewableAvailability
 
 sortedWorkloads = sortByDeadline(workloadQueue)
 scheduledTasks = []
 
 FOR each task in sortedWorkloads:
 bestTimeSlot = NULL
 minCarbonFootprint = INFINITY
 
 // Check next 24 hours for optimal slot
 FOR hour = 0 to 23:
 predictedCarbon = getCarbonIntensity(hour)
 renewable = getRenewableAvailability(hour)
 
 // Prefer low carbon and high renewable
 score = predictedCarbon * (1.0 - renewable)
 
 IF score < minCarbonFootprint AND canSchedule(task, hour):
 minCarbonFootprint = score
 bestTimeSlot = hour
 
 IF bestTimeSlot != NULL:
 schedule(task, bestTimeSlot)
 scheduledTasks.add(task)
 ELSE:
 schedule(task, earliestAvailable) // Fallback
 
 RETURN scheduledTasks
END
explanation: This algorithm schedules workloads during periods of low carbon intensity and high renewable energy availability, reducing the overall carbon footprint of cloud operations.

title: AI-Based Cooling Optimization
description: Machine learning algorithm to optimize cooling based on server load and ambient conditions
explanation: This ML-based algorithm predicts optimal cooling setpoints based on server temperatures, loads, and ambient conditions, reducing cooling energy while maintaining safe operating temperatures.

title: Container Resource Optimizer
description: Dynamic resource allocation for containers to maximize efficiency
code:
// Container Resource Optimizer
BEGIN
 INPUT: runningContainers[], clusterResources
 
 REPEAT every monitoringInterval:
 FOR each container in runningContainers:
 // Get current metrics
 cpuUsage = getCPUUsage(container)
 memoryUsage = getMemoryUsage(container)
 
 // Calculate recommended resources
 // Add 20% buffer for spikes
 recommendedCPU = cpuUsage * 1.2
 recommendedMem = memoryUsage * 1.2
 
 // Check if resizing needed
 IF recommendedCPU < container.allocatedCPU * 0.5:
 // Significantly underutilized
 newCPU = max(recommendedCPU, MIN_CPU)
 resizeContainer(container, newCPU, container.allocatedMem)
 
 ELSE IF recommendedMem < container.allocatedMem * 0.5:
 newMem = max(recommendedMem, MIN_MEM)
 resizeContainer(container, container.allocatedCPU, newMem)
 
 ELSE IF cpuUsage > container.allocatedCPU * 0.9:
 // Needs more resources
 newCPU = min(recommendedCPU * 1.5, MAX_CPU)
 resizeContainer(container, newCPU, container.allocatedMem)
 
 // Identify opportunities to pack containers
 consolidationOpportunities = findConsolidationCandidates(runningContainers)
 FOR each opportunity in consolidationOpportunities:
 IF canCoLocate(opportunity.containers):
 migrateAndCoLocate(opportunity.containers)
 
END
explanation: This optimizer dynamically adjusts container resources based on actual usage, freeing up unused capacity and enabling better node consolidation for energy efficiency.
